use_case: W2 §6 citation contract — adversarial: SourceCitationSchema.bbox is z.tuple([z.number(), z.number(), z.number(), z.number()]) (4 numbers, [x0,y0,x1,y1] normalized 0-1). A 3-element array (regression that swaps tuple-of-4 for an array<number>) breaks the click-to-source bbox overlay; this case asserts the schema rejects it.
